---
title: "Class08: Breast Cancer Mini Project"
author: "Yassaman Fakhari (PID A18541145)"
format: pdf
toc: true
---

## Background

The goal of this mini-project is for you to explore a complete analysis using the unsupervised learning techniques covered in class.

Today we will analyze a biopsy dataset from fine needle aspiration (FNA) of a breast mass.

## Data Import


The data is made available as a CSV file for download. We can read this using 'read.csv()':
```{r}
read.csv("WisconsinCancer.csv")
```
